mapper.sql: dyEvaluatId, dynamicId, reviewerId, evContent, evaluatImgUrl, evaluatDate
mapper.insert:
insert into dynamic_evaluate
dyEvaluatId,
dynamicId,
reviewerId,
headImgUrl,
nickname,
evContent,
evaluatImgUrl,
evaluatDate,
#{dyEvaluatId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{dynamicId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{reviewerId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{headImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{evContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{evaluatImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{evaluatDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update dynamic_evaluate
dynamicId = #{dynamicId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
reviewerId = #{reviewerId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
evContent = #{evContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
evaluatImgUrl = #{evaluatImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
evaluatDate = #{evaluatDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where dyEvaluatId = #{dyEvaluatId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dynamic_evaluate set dynamicId = #{dynamicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, reviewerId = #{reviewerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, evContent = #{evContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluatImgUrl = #{evaluatImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluatDate = #{evaluatDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where dyEvaluatId = #{dyEvaluatId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select de.reviewerId, de.evContent, de.evaluatImgUrl, date_format(de.evaluatDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as evaluatDate, ui.nickname, ui.headImgUrl from dynamic_evaluate de inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = de.reviewerId where de.dynamicId = #{dynamicId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by de.evaluatDate desc LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from dynamic_evaluate de inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = de.reviewerId where de.dynamicId = #{dynamicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
